style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A central rounded boundary labelled NETWORKED ENVIRONMENT. Inside it, four labelled rounded badges, each marked with a small claw symbol, reading DEVOPS, NETOPS, CYBEROPS, and MONITORING, connected to one another by thin lines to show collaboration. On the right side, a rust-coloured badge labelled WHITE-HAT CLAW faces a dashed-outline badge labelled SIMULATED THREAT ACTOR across a line labelled CAT AND MOUSE. A small caption below reads CONTINUOUS LEARNING AUTONOMOUS WORKERS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
